description_long: This is a lifelike representation of a male Mallard duck, featuring a vibrant iridescent green head, a yellow bill, and a white ring around its neck. The body is robust and rounded, with a chestnut-brown breast, grayish sides, and a darker back. Its wings are tucked neatly against its body, and the tail is short and slightly upturned. The legs and webbed feet are a bright orange, positioned beneath the body in a natural standing posture. The surface texture appears smooth with subtle feather detailing, and the overall form is anatomically accurate, capturing the characteristic stance and proportions of a Mallard drake.
description: A realistic male Mallard duck with a green head, yellow bill, brown chest, gray body, and orange webbed feet, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green head, yellow bill, white neck ring, and both orange webbed feet clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the iridescent green head, brown chest, gray body, and orange feet in a walking stance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and tail, with both feet visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same coloration as the left, with the head turned slightly and the body profile visible.
